title: Raw RNA FISH images (Moradian et al)
author: Moradian, Shafagh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw images supporting the findings of Moradian et al.   
  This folder contains two representative raw smFISH image sets for each organism, strain, and tryptophan concentration (0, 5, 50, 100 uM) tested. Fluorescently TAMRA-labelled probes targeted the  trpE  mRNA transcripts and were designed for both organisms using Stellaris® Probe Designer software (LGC Biosearch Technologies). Probe sequences are described in Moradian et al. For each condition, unprocessed brightfield (BF), DAPI, and TAMRA channels are shown, allowing assessment of cell morphology, nucleoid staining, and mRNA-probe hybrid signal. Due to slight focal-plane variations across the images, only cells with well-resolved TAMRA signal were included in downstream analyses; out-of-focus cells were excluded, as described in the Methods section of Moradian et al.  
   Organisms / strains:    
   E. coli    BW25113 (WT) and Δ trpE  (negative control),   Δ trpL,  Δ trpR ,  ΔtrpRΔtrpL  knockouts  
   B. subtilis    168  trpc+  (WT) and Δ trpE  (negative control) ,  Δ mtrB,  Δ rtpA  knockouts
